data.title: U.S. stocks hit their worst performance since September 2022, as global stocks pay for Trump's tariff plan
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Global stocks plunged on Thursday as U.S. President Trump's comprehensive tariff plan kicked off a trade war with wide-ranging impacts on the global economy. Public fears about rising prices, slowing economic growth and even the possibility of a recession caused U.S. stock indexes to plummet, recording their worst single-day performance since at least September 2022. Apparel and retail companies led the decline, with Williams-Sonoma, Ralph Lauren and Deckers Outdoor all falling more than 17%. Technology and technology retail stocks such as HP, Best Buy and Garmin all fell at least 15%. Magnificent 7 stocks, which have led the market higher in the past two years, also fell generally, with Apple and Amazon both falling more than 8%. More than 400 stocks in the S&P 500 fell.
The S&P 500 is now down 4.1%, on track for its biggest single-day drop since September 2022.
The Nasdaq's decline once widened to 5.8%, which is expected to be the biggest single-day drop since March 2020. (Jinshi)

data.title: Trader Highlights Risks of Fully Transparent On-Chain Positions
data.description: According to Odaily, trader Eugene Ng Ah Sio expressed concerns on his personal channel about the risks associated with fully transparent on-chain positions, whether leveraged or not. He suggested that if the game theory is compelling enough, predatory behavior is likely to occur.

data.title: Bitwise Launches ETFs Focused on Options Income Strategies
data.description: According to Foresight News, Bitwise has announced the introduction of three new ETFs designed to track options income strategies for specific companies. The ETFs are named Bitwise MSTR Options Income Strategy ETF (IMST), Bitwise COIN Options Income Strategy ETF (ICOI), and Bitwise MARA Options Income Strategy ETF (IMRA). These funds are distributed by Foreside Fund Services, LLC.

data.title: Trader Eugene: There are risks in fully disclosing positions on the chain
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Trader Eugene Ng Ah Sio posted on his personal channel, "We will soon find that fully public positions (whether leveraged or not) are not ideal on the chain. If the game theory is attractive enough, hunting behavior will definitely happen."

data.title: In the past 4 hours, the total liquidation of the entire network reached 119 million US dollars, mainly due to long orders
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that Coinglass data showed that in the past 4 hours, the entire network’s liquidation reached 119 million US dollars, of which long positions were liquidated for 101 million US dollars and short positions were liquidated for 18.1711 million US dollars.

data.title: Bitwise Launches Three Option Income Strategy ETFs Tracking Strategy, Coinbase, and MARA
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Bitwise announced on the X platform the launch of three option income strategy ETFs tracking Strategy, Coinbase and MARA, namely: BitwiseMSTR Option Income Strategy ETF (IMST), Bitwise COIN Option Income Strategy ETF (ICOI), and Bitwise MARA Option Income Strategy ETF (IMRA). ICOI, IMRA and IMST are distributed by Foreside Fund Services, LLC, which has no affiliation with Bitwise or any of its affiliates.

data.title: BNB Drops Below 580 USDT with a 3.91% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 03, 2025, 14:50 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 580 USDT and is now trading at 579.900024 USDT, with a narrowed 3.91% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Powell's Upcoming Speech May Impact Rate Cut Expectations
data.description: According to BlockBeats, financial analysis from Forexlive suggests that U.S. Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell's speech on Friday holds greater significance than the non-farm payroll data. The market has fully anticipated a rate cut in June, but Federal Reserve officials have adopted a more hawkish stance on tariff issues. If Powell's rhetoric also shifts towards a hawkish tone, there could be a substantial reevaluation of the market's expectations for a rate cut.

data.title: Today, the US Bitcoin ETF has a net inflow of 1,941 BTC, and the Ethereum ETF has a net outflow of 11,195 ETH
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Lookonchain monitoring, 10 US Bitcoin ETFs had a net inflow of 1,941 BTC today, of which ARK 21Shares had an inflow of 1,500 BTC. It currently holds 47,974 BTC, worth US$3.95 billion; 9 Ethereum ETFs had a net outflow of 11,195 ETH, of which BlackRock had an outflow of 10,596 ETH. BlackRock currently holds 1,181,170 ETH, worth US$2.1 billion.

data.title: 1 hour ago DWF Labs interacts with the Trump family crypto project WLFI's stablecoin USD1
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to The Data Nerd’s monitoring, 1 hour ago DWF Labs interacted with the Trump family’s crypto project WLFI’s stablecoin USD1, and may have transferred 105 USD1, and is suspected to become WLFI’s main stablecoin partner.
